Title: Report inconsistency

Test Steps:

4. Confirm submission of report
5. Attach photos if necessary
Expected Result:
Report is sent to system administrator and vendor if applicable. User receives notification on report status. If approved, report can lead to updates in the system.

Title: Response Time for Main Operations
Preconditions: Application is running on a device with active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Perform main operations such as loading the map, viewing stores, and navigating through sections.
2. Measure the time taken for each operation.
3. Verify that the response time is less than 2 seconds for 95% of the user actions.
Expected Result: The response time for main operations should be less than 2 seconds in 95% of the user actions.

Title: Handling High Loads
Preconditions: Application is running on a device with active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate simultaneous access by at least 10,000 users.
2. Monitor CPU usage.
3. Verify that the system maintains good performance without degrading, with CPU usage below 80%.
Expected Result: The system should handle at least 10,000 concurrent users without degrading performance, with CPU usage below 80%.

Title: Memory Usage Optimization
Preconditions: Application is running on a device with active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Run the application on a mobile device.
2. Monitor memory usage.
3. Verify that the application uses less than 300 MB of RAM, with less than 70% maximum memory usage.
Expected Result: The application should use less than 300 MB of RAM, with less than 70% maximum memory usage.

Title: Intuitive Interface
Preconditions: Application is running on a device with active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through various sections of the application (map view, product listings, reviews).
2. Complete primary tasks using fewer than three clicks or taps.
3. Measure the percentage of users who complete primary tasks without external assistance.
Expected Result: At least 95% of users should be able to complete primary tasks without external assistance or guides.

Title: User Feedback
Preconditions: Application is running on a device with active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions such as leaving a review, applying a filter, or reporting an issue.
2. Verify that feedback is immediately visible within 500ms.
3. Ensure the error rate for confirmation feedback is less than 1%.
Expected Result: User interactions should be confirmed with visible feedback within 500ms, with an error rate of less than 1%.

Title: GDPR Compliance
Preconditions: Application is running on a device with active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Check that the application obtains explicit consent for data collection and processing.
2. Verify that users can access, modify, and delete their data.
3. Ensure data is protected through encryption and other security measures.
Expected Result: The application should comply with GDPR requirements, including obtaining explicit consent, allowing data access, modification, and deletion, and protecting data through encryption.
